body_txt: This tends to evoke shock and/or terror in the attacker due to the Refuge in Audacity involved, often allowing the stabbee to catch them off guard (helped by the fact that the attacker is effectively disarmed). Can be Truth in Television , as being impaled through the belly would mean a slow death from sepsis if blood loss and shock didn't do the job, and the impaled person could be running on enough adrenaline to have the strength to pull this off, provided the weapon wasn't designed to prevent this. This trope can also apply to someone stabbed in their extremities, such an as Impaled Palm , who could possibly even survive their injury. Sub-Trope of Impaled with Extreme Prejudice . Compare Deliberate Injury Gambit . One of the ways to make an opponent Left Stuck After Attack .
